inputs.text: Bachha ko bukhar hai, bahut thakawat mahsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Mild fever and fatigue are common symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Although bronchitis is possible, the symptoms are not specific enough to confirm

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: The symptoms are not typical of Tuberculosis at this stage

inputs.text: Bachha ko khaansi ho rahi hai, dry cough hai

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Dry cough is a common symptom of bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Although viral fever is still possible, the cough suggests another condition

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: The symptoms are not typical of Tuberculosis at this stage

inputs.text: Bachha ko raat ko pasina aata hai, wazan kam ho raha hai, khaansi 2 hafte se zyada hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: The combination of night sweats, weight loss, and prolonged cough is highly suggestive of Tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Although bronchitis is still possible, the night sweats and weight loss suggest another condition

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Pneumonia is less likely given the prolonged duration of symptoms

inputs.text: Bachha ki halat bahut kharab hai, weakness bahut adhik hai, balgam mein khoon aaya hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: The presence of blood in sputum and severe weakness confirm the diagnosis of Tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the presence of blood in sputum and severe weakness

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the prolonged duration of symptoms and presence of blood in sputum
